scripts.build: npm run build -w @voiceid/contracts && npm run build -w @voiceid/auth-api && npm run build -w @voiceid/online-beta
scripts.check: npm run check:site && npm run check:workspace
scripts.check:workspace: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.format: biome format --write package.json tsconfig.base.json biome.json packages/contracts services/auth-api apps/online-beta
scripts.lint: biome lint package.json tsconfig.base.json biome.json packages/contracts services/auth-api apps/online-beta
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @voiceid/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @voiceid/auth-api && npm run typecheck -w @voiceid/online-beta
